Explained: Why global brokerages are hitting panic button on India. FII exodus, oil shock ringing alarm?
articles.description: Equity market has shifted sharply from optimism to crisis mode, marked by a record $13 billion FII outflow in March—the worst ever. The sell-off has been driven by a surge in oil prices following Gulf tensions, with Brent crude jumping over 50%, worsening inflation, trade deficits, and corporate margins. Existing weaknesses like a weak rupee, sluggish earnings, high valuations, and global trade pressures have compounded the impact, turning investor sentiment from an “India premium” to an “India exit.”

articles.description: CCS meet today LIVE updates: In the earlier CCS meeting chaired by PM Modi on March 22, Cabinet Committee on Security (CCS) reviewed the situation arising out of the conflict in West Asia and a detailed assessment was made on the availability of critical needs.

articles.title: Quote of the day: Marie Curie's words of wisdom on personal growth— 'Be less curious about people and more about….'
articles.description: Polish-French scientist Marie Curie advised one to prioritize curiosity about ideas over curiosity about individuals., encouraging the significance of intellectual exploration.

articles.title: India begins world’s largest population census
articles.description: More than three million Indian officials have begun the yearlong task of counting the country’s population.

topStories.title: Three Teens Facing Terrorism Charges Over BofA Bombing Attempt
topStories.description: French prosecutors are seeking terrorism charges against an adult and three teens aged 16-17 over a foiled bombing attack near the Bank of America Corp. office in Paris, seen as a likely retaliation to the war with Iran.

topStories.title: US messages via Witkoff and intermediaries are not negotiations: Araghchi
topStories.description: Iran's foreign minister says message exchanges continue with Washington, but insists there are no negotiations or trust.

topStories.title: US Can Walk Away, Israel Cannot - What This Turning Point Means In Iran War?
topStories.description: As the conflict evolves, an expert points to a shift in risks between key players, suggesting different paths ahead for countries involved in the crisis.

topStories.title: No GAAR On Income From Pre-April 1, 2017 Investments, Government Clarifies
topStories.description: The latest development comes after the Supreme Court ruled against Mauritius-based Tiger Global International, upholding the Income Tax Department's right.

topStories.title: ‘Be aware of Congress, it is planning to bring a dangerous law in Assam’: Modi
topStories.description: The PM alleged that the Congress was preparing to introduce a law that would unfairly target the majority community.

topStories.title: US-Iran war: UK PM Keir Starmer is due to address the nation today - What's brewing?
topStories.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will address the nation on the Middle East conflict and rising living costs at 10 AM local time.

topStories.title: ‘BJP loot diwas’: Congress slams price hike of essential commodities
topStories.description: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge said while the common citizens are hoping for relief, the BJP leadership remains entirely focused on "looting the public and plundering the nation amidst this crisis"

topStories.title: SIR in Bengal: 47 lakh objections disposed of till March 31, Calcutta HC Chief Justice informs Supreme Court
topStories.description: A Bench led by Chief Justice Surya Kant said they were apprised that by April 7, all objections will be decided

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 33 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: Trump says US could leave Iran war in 2-3 weeks without a deal; Iran’s FM Araghchi says he has no faith in talks.

topStories.title: Oil slides 4% to below $100/bbl as Middle East uncertainty keeps markets on edge
topStories.description: Oil prices experienced a significant drop of over 4% as Middle East tensions continued to influence markets, despite indications of a potential easing of the U.S.-Iran conflict. Investors locked in gains amid uncertainty, with analysts noting that even if the conflict ends, supply chain normalization and infrastructure damage will likely keep prices elevated.

topStories.title: President Trump ‘deeply cares’ about India-US relationship, says ambassador Sergio Gor
topStories.description: Last week, PM Modi and Trump held the first phone call since the beginning of the Iran war and discussed the situation in the Gulf region.

topStories.title: Breakthrough or escalation? Donald Trump to announce ‘important’ Iran War update tomorrow — what to expect
topStories.description: On Tuesday, Trump told reporters in White House that the military could end its Iran offensive in two to three weeks and would shift responsibility for the Strait of Hormuz to countries that rely on it for oil and shipping.

dailyNews.title: Megan Thee Stallion taken to hospital during Moulin Rouge performance
dailyNews.description: The rapper "started feeling very ill" mid-way through the show in New York, her representative told US media.

dailyNews.title: Visa, immigration changes in April 2026: US, UK, Canada, EU tighten rules - Business Standard
dailyNews.description: Visa, immigration changes in April 2026: US, UK, Canada, EU tighten rules  Business Standard

dailyNews.title: Judge Orders Construction Stopped on Trump’s White House Ballroom
dailyNews.description: A federal judge required the president to seek lawmakers’ input and pursue traditional approvals before proceeding with the $400 million replacement for the East Wing.

dailyNews.title: Trump Signs Order Seeking Federal Control of Mail Voting as He Promotes False Claims
dailyNews.description: Election experts and Democratic officials called the order legally invalid, and Arizona and Oregon pledged to immediately challenge it in court.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Struggles to Respond to Trump’s Suit Against IRS
dailyNews.description: Officials at the department and the White House are in the middle of a messy and complicated debate over how to respond to President Trump’s lawsuit demanding $10 billion from the I.R.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Halted Nuclear Threat From Iran, Despite Evidence to the Contrary
dailyNews.description: For the second time in recent days, President Trump declared that one of the key objectives of the war had been accomplished.

dailyNews.title: Trump Seeks to Redefine ‘Regime Change’ in Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump and his aides have made contradictory statements on whether the United States and Israel have transformed the Iranian government through violence.

dailyNews.title: The Sailors Stranded in the Persian Gulf
dailyNews.description: Thousands of civilian sailors have been stranded for more than a month in waters surrounded by a conflict zone because of the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Backdoor Funding of Homeland Security Agency Could Weaken Congress Anew
dailyNews.description: An emerging Republican plan to skirt a Democratic filibuster and fund an entire department without congressional appropriations would be the latest example of surrendering power to the White House.

dailyNews.title: Who Is Getting Paid During the Department of Homeland Security Shutdown?
dailyNews.description: At least 120,000 law enforcement officers who work for the agency have continued to collect paychecks throughout the funding lapse. But tens of thousands of workers have gone without pay.

dailyNews.title: South Dakotans React to Daily Mail Article on Bryon Noem, Kristi Noem’s Husband
dailyNews.description: In the tiny town of Castlewood, S.D., where everyone knows the Noems, the prevailing sense was that people can’t help but feel bad for Bryon Noem after a tabloid photo leak.

dailyNews.title: Gavin Newsom Suggests His Conservative Critics Are Gay in Online Insults Criticized as Homophobic
dailyNews.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom’s aides said that their online insults were meant to ridicule figures on the right. But some critics say they are homophobic.

topStories.description: President Trump indicated the Iran war may wrap up "very soon" and he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the war pushed U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.description: President Trump indicated the Iran war may wrap up "very soon" and he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the war pushed U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Trump to give "important update on Iran" tonight in prime-time speech
dailyNews.description: President Trump is planning to deliver a prime-time address Wednesday night to "provide an important update on Iran," the White House said, as the president faces critical decisions in the monthlong war.

dailyNews.title: Trump plans to attend Supreme Court arguments in birthright citizenship case
dailyNews.description: President Trump is planning to go to the Supreme Court on Wednesday as the justices take up his executive order seeking to end birthright citizenship, a major test of his immigration agenda.

dailyNews.title: Judge orders Trump admin. to restore legal status of migrants allowed in under Biden
dailyNews.description: A federal judge directed the Trump administration to restore the legal status of migrants allowed into the U.S. under a now-defunct Biden administration program for asylum-seekers who arrived at the southern border.

dailyNews.title: 3/5: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump ousts Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary; Trump picks Sen. Mullin (R-OK) to replace Noem

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court's showdown on birthright citizenship decision could reshape America
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court weighs Trump's Executive Order on birthright citizenship, examining the Fourteenth Amendment's meaning and its application to children of illegal immigrants.

dailyNews.title: April showdowns: 4 key races to watch this month that will test Trump, GOP grip on power
dailyNews.description: Four April elections — two House special elections, a Wisconsin Supreme Court race, and Virginia's redistricting referendum — could reshape the razor-thin House majority.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's new Iran option: USS Tripoli ready to strike fast, hard
dailyNews.description: USS Tripoli's F-35B Lightning jump jets, MV-22B Ospreys, and CH-53E Super Stallions give CENTCOM strike options against Iran in Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin unlawfully terminated legal status of migrants who used Biden-era app, judge rules
dailyNews.description: A federal judge ruled the Trump administration unlawfully ended parole status for migrants who used the CBP One app, and ordered DHS to reverse the move.

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order overhauling mail-in voting in major election integrity push
dailyNews.description: Trump signed an executive order targeting mail-in voting and voter eligibility, directing agencies to compile citizenship lists and add USPS tracking.

dailyNews.title: Trump to address nation on Iran war Wednesday night, White House says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he expected that U.S. military forces will leave Iran in "two or three weeks."

dailyNews.title: Trump signs executive order limiting mail-in voting ahead of 2026 U.S. elections
dailyNews.description: Trump has put pressure on Congress to pass the SAVE America Act, a measure that would require photo identification and proof of U.S. citizenship to vote.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth lifts suspension of Kid Rock Army helicopter flyby crews after Trump comments
dailyNews.description: Kid Rock is a prominent supporter of President Donald Trump and performed at the 2024 Republican National Convention.
